name: oh-my-experiments
description: Experiment-analysis & design lane. Route here when the work is about ANALYZING experiment/training RESULTS or DESIGNING THE NEXT EXPERIMENT: compare runs, read eval/training curves, diagnose why a run regressed, propose the next config, run a semi-autonomous analyze->design->eval loop. Governs HOW you work on experiments — NOT writing the model code itself (that is superpowers), NOT generic parallel throughput (that is oh-my-claudecode). Routing here is a COMMITMENT TO ACT, not a label: once you declare this lane you MUST actually invoke an omx skill / the project's omx engine (exp-init/analyze/design/loop, the .omx/profile analyzer, `omx` CLI, `omx wiki`) — declaring 'ROUTE -> oh-my-experiments' and then hand-reading raw TensorBoard / curves yourself is the exact anti-pattern this lane exists to stop.

skills.name: experiment-analysis-lane
skills.description: Signals that route to oh-my-experiments (session then picks exp-init/analyze/design/loop).
examples: analyze these N training runs and tell me what changed
이 run들 분석하고 다음 실험 설계해줘
why did this run regress vs baseline — diagnose from the curves
compare run A and run B at the same iteration
set up the experiment-analysis infra for this research (exp-init)
퇴근할 거니까 알아서 분석하고 다음 실험까지 돌려놔
